SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-06-2026 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-06-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-06-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF SEDA POGHOSYAN AND LEONID ORINSHTEYN ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT SALFITI OSAMA SUHEIL IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POGHOSYAN, SEDA ORINSHTEYN, LEONID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUHEIL, SALFITI OSAMA $5,403.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,478.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,403.00 FILED BY POGHOSYAN, SEDA ORINSHTEYN, LEONID AS TO DEFENDANT SUHEIL, SALFITI OSAMA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-06-2026 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
